mapper.select: SELECT * FROM global_character_appearances WHERE character_id = #{characterId} AND appearance_index = #{appearanceIndex}
SELECT MAX(appearance_index) FROM global_character_appearances WHERE character_id = #{characterId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO global_character_appearances ( appearance_id, character_id, appearance_index, change_reason, art_style, description, descriptions, description_source, image_url, image_media_id, image_urls, selected_index, previous_image_url, previous_image_media_id, previous_image_urls, previous_descriptions, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{appearanceId}, #{characterId}, #{appearanceIndex}, #{changeReason}, #{artStyle}, #{description}, #{descriptions, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, #{descriptionSource}, #{imageUrl}, #{imageMediaId}, #{imageUrls, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, #{selectedIndex}, #{previousImageUrl}, #{previousImageMediaId}, #{previousImageUrls, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, #{previousDescriptions, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE global_character_appearances SET change_reason = #{changeReason}, art_style = #{artStyle}, description = #{description}, descriptions = #{descriptions, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, description_source = #{descriptionSource}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, image_media_id = #{imageMediaId}, image_urls = #{imageUrls, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, selected_index = #{selectedIndex}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE appearance_id = #{appearanceId}

UPDATE global_character_appearances SET image_urls = #{imageUrls, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, selected_index = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE appearance_id = #{appearanceId}

UPDATE global_character_appearances SET previous_image_url = #{previousImageUrl}, previous_image_media_id = #{previousImageMediaId}, previous_image_urls = #{previousImageUrls, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, previous_descriptions = #{previousDescriptions, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE appearance_id = #{appearanceId}

UPDATE global_character_appearances SET image_url = previous_image_url, image_media_id = previous_image_media_id, image_urls = previous_image_urls, descriptions = previous_descriptions, previous_image_url = NULL, previous_image_media_id = NULL, previous_image_urls = NULL, previous_descriptions = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE appearance_id = #{appearanceId}
